x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: AI Agents orchestrate all automation through Flow Designer subflows. Instances with no active flows cannot leverage Agentic AI for process automation regardless of other configurations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create Flow Designer flows for key ITSM and ITOM processes via sys_hub_flow_list.do. Migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer subflows. Target: 10+ active flows. AI Agents exclusively use Flow Designer for orchestration.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c10
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[AI Agents orchestrate all automation through Flow Designer subflows. Instances with no active flows cannot leverage Agentic AI for process automation regardless of other configurations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Flow Designer Active Flows</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_hub_flow');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Flow Designer flows';

    if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active Flow Designer flows. AI Agents have a strong orchestration foundation — Flow Designer is the exclusive execution layer for AI Agent automation.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active Flow Designer flows (target: 10+). Limited flow coverage restricts AI Agent operational scope — migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active Flow Designer flows. AI Agents exclusively orchestrate through Flow Designer — without flows, AI Agent automation cannot execute.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000482</number><order>30</order><remediation_guidance>Create Flow Designer flows for key ITSM and ITOM processes via sys_hub_flow_list.do. Migrate legacy Workflow Engine processes to Flow Designer subflows. Target: 10+ active flows. AI Agents exclusively use Flow Designer for orchestration.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c10</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Flow Designer Active Flows</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c10</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
